overall.description: A smooth first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk corridor featuring teal neon ceiling lights, red floor accents, and glowing red crystalline structures. The camera approaches a large metal door at the end of the hallway. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic lighting and reflections.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the corridor toward the distant metal door

continuous red neon strips running along the right edge of the floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow futuristic corridor illuminated by teal ceiling panels and red floor accent lights. Geometric patterned walls flank both sides, featuring glowing red crystalline structures. The space is empty of people, with a large metal door visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the end of the corridor

events.description: camera slows down as it approaches the metal door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing forward and decelerating as it nears the large metal door

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the corridor, approaching the large metal door as the red crystalline structures and geometric wall panels grow larger in the frame. The movement slows in the final moments as the camera comes to a stop directly in front of the door, with the glowing red structures now prominent in the near foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow cyberpunk corridor that culminates in a close-up approach to a massive metal door. It begins by gliding past geometric patterned walls illuminated by teal ceiling panels and red floor accent lights. As the camera advances, the glowing red crystalline structures embedded in the walls grow larger and more detailed in the frame. The perspective then shifts from a wide view of the empty hallway to a focused approach, with the movement gradually slowing. Finally, the camera comes to a complete stop directly in front of the metal door, leaving the vibrant red crystals prominent in the immediate foreground.
